title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research

summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: vicquick/nobrainr

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
